title: 緊急プレゼンテーション

text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide turns to me on the way home one
day.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, do you mind if we stop by that cafe
again?
choice_data_list: Of course not. We have the time, anyway.
Of course not. We have the time, anyway.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Thanks. There's something I want to tell the
owner.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hello. I hope I'm not bothering you, but I'd like to
talk to you about something. Not as a customer,
but just in general.

text_block_list.name: Cafe Owner
text_block_list.text: It's you again. Sure... What is it?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
The last time I was here, I wasn't able to
communicate my point very well.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
My failure to do so has been bothering me ever
since, so I wanted to try convincing you one more
time.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: This time, I've prepared a presentation!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: First, let me introduce some current data to you.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Your clientele tends to skew slightly older, and
customers usually come alone or in pairs.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Their main purpose of visiting is to read, study, or
work. In general, they're lone adults who are
looking to use their time efficiently.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You should take advantage of this and create a
space for your core clientele to relax in!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
There are a few things you can do to transform
this space into a hidden gem of sorts and attract
an older crowd.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
For example, you can dim the lights and decorate
the space with wood paneling and antique
furniture!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
And that concludes my presentation! What do
you think?

At the end of her talk, Biwa Hayahide is as
breathless with excitement as she is after finishing
a close race.

text_block_list.name: Cafe Owner
text_block_list.text:
I... I don't know what to say. I'm flattered that
there's someone out there who cares so much
about my shop.

text_block_list.name: Cafe Owner
text_block_list.text: But why do you care so much?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
The first reason is simply because I like this cafe
and come here often.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: The second is, well...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Because I firmly believe that applied logic can win
over raw talent.

Biwa Hayahide's eyes sparkle with firm conviction.
Her words ring true to her sincere approach to
life.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
When you first told me about your situation, I saw
myself in your story.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I also know what it's like to feel overwhelmed by
seemingly unbeatable competition.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But no matter how strong an opponent might be,
there's always a way to triumph over the odds.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I sincerely believe that, and I want you to believe
it too.

text_block_list.name: Cafe Owner
text_block_list.text: Wow. I...

text_block_list.name: Cafe Owner
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. I think I'll give some more thought to
the fate of this place.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I'm glad I was able to present my idea
before the cafe closed for good.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I'm glad I was able to present my idea
before the cafe closed for good.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hm... I suppose all the reasoning and theorizing I
do on a daily basis came in handy.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I hope I didn't come off as too high and mighty,
though. After all, everything I've learned was
through trial and error.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But I understand how discouraging it can be to
face such tough odds, and I don't want the owner
to give up so easily.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I really hope I was able to communicate that.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Haha... You don't think I was being too pushy, do
you?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It's hard for me to temper my feelings when it
comes to things I'm passionate about.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I didn't even plan on making a presentation,
originally. It just sort of... happened.
choice_data_list:
That was pretty good for something you didn't
even plan!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad I made it. I think it helped me get my
point across more clearly.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hm... You really think so?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad to hear my logic was able to motivate
others.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm fairly confident in my analytical abilities, so
let me know if you are ever in need of them.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I can examine any issue of yours from different
angles and analyze it for you.

Several days pass since Biwa Hayahide and I last
went out together.
choice_data_list: I wonder what happened to that cafe?
I wonder what happened to that cafe?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: It's still open and operational, of course. Look.

I peer into the window and see that it's been
remodeled to feel more intimate. There are
several customers inside relaxing.

All of them are leisurely sipping coffee or reading
books. It looks very cozy even from the outside.
choice_data_list: The owner really took your advice to heart!
The owner really took your advice to heart!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Indeed. I'm so glad.

She looks so genuinely happy that I can't help but
feel the same way.
